creator: james@expresslane.ca
text:
Nicolas.Souchu@prism.uvsq.fr has ported the Linux parallel port ZIP
driver to FreeBSD.  Can we consider adding it to the 3.0-current tree (once
2.2-release has been taken care of ) ?

How-To-Repeat: 
	The information page for the driver is available at 

	http://www.prism.uvsq.fr/~son/ppa3.html
